name: coTfsShowEmergenciesInReport
title: coTfsShowEmergenciesInReport
description: This function is replaced by coTfsSetReportBehaviour.
tables: Obsolete Function This function is replaced by coTfsSetReportBehaviour.
Allows the report of emergency code in the test protocol. If the function is activated in the test module (default), each recognized emergency code is added to the test report.
enable 0: emergency codes are not written to test report 1: emergency codes are written to test report
Example coTfsShowEmergenciesInReport(1); // enable writing emergency codes to test report
